req.title: Break-glass access
req.statement: A clinician shall invoke break-glass access for an emergent patient; break-glass use shall be audited and trigger a post-event review.

tests.name: naive_case
tests.executable:
```python
"""
Pytest tests for Break-Glass Emergency Access Requirement.

Requirement: A clinician shall invoke break-glass access for an emergent patient;
break-glass use shall be audited and trigger a post-event review.

Test Strategy:
- Unit tests for break-glass invocation logic
- Audit logging verification
- Post-event review trigger verification
- Authorization and access control
- Edge cases and error handling
"""

import pytest
import uuid
from datetime import datetime, timedelta
from unittest.mock import MagicMock, patch, call, ANY
from dataclasses import dataclass, field
from typing import Optional
from enum import Enum


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Domain models (stand-ins for the real application models)
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

class UserRole(Enum):
    CLINICIAN = "clinician"
    ADMIN = "admin"
    AUDITOR = "auditor"
    PATIENT = "patient"


class AccessLevel(Enum):
    NORMAL = "normal"
    BREAK_GLASS = "break_glass"


class ReviewStatus(Enum):
    PENDING = "pending"
    IN_PROGRESS = "in_progress"
    COMPLETED = "completed"
    ESCALATED = "escalated"


@dataclass
class User:
    user_id: str
    name: str
    role: UserRole
    license_number: Optional[str] = None
    department: Optional[str] = None


@dataclass
class Patient:
    patient_id: str
    name: str
    is_emergent: bool = False


@dataclass
class AuditEntry:
    entry_id: str
    event_type: str
    actor_user_id: str
    patient_id: str
    timestamp: datetime
    access_level: AccessLevel
    reason: str
    metadata: dict = field(default_factory=dict)


@dataclass
class PostEventReview:
    review_id: str
    audit_entry_id: str
    clinician_id: str
    patient_id: str
    created_at: datetime
    status: ReviewStatus
    due_date: datetime
    assigned_reviewer_id: Optional[str] = None
    resolution_notes: Optional[str] = None


@dataclass
class BreakGlassAccessResult:
    success: bool
    access_token: Optional[str]
    audit_entry_id: Optional[str]
    review_id: Optional[str]
    error_message: Optional[str] = None


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Exceptions
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

class UnauthorizedBreakGlassError(Exception):
    """Raised when a non-clinician attempts break-glass access."""


class PatientNotFoundError(Exception):
    """Raised when the target patient does not exist."""


class MissingReasonError(Exception):
    """Raised when no reason is supplied for break-glass access."""


class AuditServiceError(Exception):
    """Raised when the audit service fails to record an entry."""


class ReviewServiceError(Exception):
    """Raised when the review service fails to create a review."""


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Fixtures
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

@pytest.fixture
def clinician():
    return User(
        user_id="clinician-001",
        name="Dr. Jane Smith",
        role=UserRole.CLINICIAN,
        license_number="MD-123456",
        department="Emergency",
    )


@pytest.fixture
def non_clinician_user():
    return User(
        user_id="admin-001",
        name="Bob Admin",
        role=UserRole.ADMIN,
    )


@pytest.fixture
def emergent_patient():
    return Patient(
        patient_id="patient-001",
        name="John Doe",
        is_emergent=True,
    )


@pytest.fixture
def non_emergent_patient():
    return Patient(
        patient_id="patient-002",
        name="Jane Regular",
        is_emergent=False,
    )


@pytest.fixture
def mock_audit_service():
    service = MagicMock()
    service.record.return_value = AuditEntry(
        entry_id="audit-001",
        event_type="BREAK_GLASS_ACCESS",
        actor_user_id="clinician-001",
        patient_id="patient-001",
        timestamp=datetime.utcnow(),
        access_level=AccessLevel.BREAK_GLASS,
        reason="Patient unresponsive, immediate intervention required",
    )
    return service


@pytest.fixture
def mock_review_service():
    service = MagicMock()
    service.create_review.return_value = PostEventReview(
        review_id="review-001",
        audit_entry_id="audit-001",
        clinician_id="clinician-001",
        patient_id="patient-001",
        created_at=datetime.utcnow(),
        status=ReviewStatus.PENDING,
        due_date=datetime.utcnow() + timedelta(hours=24),
    )
    return service


@pytest.fixture
def mock_patient_repository():
    repo = MagicMock()
    return repo


@pytest.fixture
def mock_notification_service():
    return MagicMock()


@pytest.fixture
def mock_access_token_service():
    service = MagicMock()
    service.generate_token.return_value = "mock-access-token-xyz"
    return service


@pytest.fixture
def break_glass_service(
    mock_audit_service,
    mock_review_service,
    mock_patient_repository,
    mock_notification_service,
    mock_access_token_service,
):
    """
    Constructs the system under test with all collaborators injected.
    Replace the import path with your actual application module.
    """
    from break_glass_service import BreakGlassService  # noqa: PLC0415

    return BreakGlassService(
        audit_service=mock_audit_service,
        review_service=mock_review_service,
        patient_repository=mock_patient_repository,
        notification_service=mock_notification_service,
        access_token_service=mock_access_token_service,
    )


VALID_REASON = "Patient unresponsive, immediate intervention required"


# ===========================================================================
# 1. INVOCATION – clinician can invoke break-glass access
# ===========================================================================

class TestBreakGlassInvocation:
    """Tests that a clinician can successfully invoke break-glass access."""

    def test_clinician_can_invoke_break_glass(
        self, break_glass_service, clinician, emergent_patient,
        mock_patient_repository
    ):
        """A credentialed clinician receives access when invoking break-glass."""
        mock_patient_repository.find_by_id.return_value = emergent_patient

        result = break_glass_service.invoke(
            actor=clinician,
            patient_id=emergent_patient.patient_id,
            reason=VALID_REASON,
        )

        assert result.success is True
        assert result.access_token is not None

    def test_break_glass_returns_valid_access_token(
        self, break_glass_service, clinician, emergent_patient,
        mock_patient_repository, mock_access_token_service
    ):
        """The returned access token must be non-empty and match the generated value."""
        mock_patient_repository.find_by_id.return_value = emergent_patient
        expected_token = "mock-access-token-xyz"
        mock_access_token_service.generate_token.return_value = expected_token

        result = break_glass_service.invoke(
            actor=clinician,
            patient_id=emergent_patient.patient_id,
            reason=VALID_REASON,
        )

        assert result.access_token == expected_token

    def test_non_clinician_cannot_invoke_break_glass(
        self, break_glass_service, non_clinician_user, emergent_patient,
        mock_patient_repository
    ):
        """Only clinicians may invoke break-glass; other roles must be rejected."""
        mock_patient_repository.find_by_id.return_value = emergent_patient

        with pytest.raises(UnauthorizedBreakGlassError):
            break_glass_service.invoke(
                actor=non_clinician_user,
                patient_id=emergent_patient.patient_id,
                reason=VALID_REASON,
            )

    @pytest.mark.parametrize("role", [UserRole.ADMIN, UserRole.AUDITOR, UserRole.PATIENT])
    def test_all_non_clinician_roles_are_rejected(
        self, break_glass_service, emergent_patient,
        mock_patient_repository, role
    ):
        """Parameterised check: every non-CLINICIAN role must be denied."""
        mock_patient_repository.find_by_id.return_value = emergent_patient
        non_clinician = User(user_id="u-99", name="Someone", role=role)

        with pytest.raises(UnauthorizedBreakGlassError):
            break_glass_service.invoke(
                actor=non_clinician,
                patient_id=emergent_patient.patient_id,
                reason=VALID_REASON,
            )

    def test_break_glass_requires_a_reason(
        self, break_glass_service, clinician, emergent_patient,
        mock_patient_repository
    ):
        """Invocation without a stated reason must be rejected."""
        mock_patient_repository.find_by_id.return_value = emergent_patient

        with pytest.raises(MissingReasonError):
            break_glass_service.invoke(
                actor=clinician,
                patient_id=emergent_patient.patient_id,
                reason="",
            )

    def test_break_glass_requires_non_whitespace_reason(
        self, break_glass_service, clinician, emergent_patient,
        mock_patient_repository
    ):
        """A reason that is only whitespace must also be rejected."""
        mock_patient_repository.find_by_id.return_value = emergent_patient

        with pytest.raises(MissingReasonError):
            break_glass_service.invoke(
                actor=clinician,
                patient_id=emergent_patient.patient_id,
                reason="   ",
            )

    def test_break_glass_on_unknown_patient_raises_error(
        self, break_glass_service, clinician, mock_patient_repository
    ):
        """Attempting break-glass for a non-existent patient must fail gracefully."""
        mock_patient_repository.find_by_id.return_value = None

        with pytest.raises(PatientNotFoundError):
            break_glass_service.invoke(
                actor=clinician,
                patient_id="unknown-patient-999",
                reason=VALID_REASON,
            )

    def test_break_glass_invocation_queries_correct_patient(
        self, break_glass_service, clinician, emergent_patient,
        mock_patient_repository
    ):
        """The service must look up the exact patient ID supplied by the clinician."""
        mock_patient_repository.find_by_id.return_value = emergent_patient

        break_glass_service.invoke(
            actor=clinician,
            patient_id=emergent_patient.patient_id,
            reason=VALID_REASON,
        )

        mock_patient_repository.find_by_id.assert_called_once_with(
            emergent_patient.patient_id
        )


# ===========================================================================
# 2. AUDIT – every break-glass use is recorded
# ===========================================================================

class TestBreakGlassAuditing:
    """Tests that every break-glass invocation is fully audited."""

    def test_audit_service_is_called_on_successful_invocation(
        self, break_glass_service, clinician, emergent_patient,
        mock_patient_repository, mock_audit_service
    ):
        """The audit service must be called exactly once per invocation."""
        mock_patient_repository.find_by_id.return_value = emergent_patient

        break_glass_service.invoke(
            actor=clinician,
            patient_id=emergent_patient.patient_id,
            reason=VALID_REASON,
        )

        mock_audit_service.record.assert_called_once()

    def test_audit_entry_contains_clinician_identity(
        self, break_glass_service, clinician, emergent_patient,
        mock_patient_repository, mock_audit_service
    ):
        """The audit record must capture the invoking clinician's identity."""
        mock_patient_repository.find_by_id.return_value = emergent_patient

        break_glass_service.invoke(
            actor=clinician,
            patient_id=emergent_patient.patient_id,
            reason=VALID_REASON,
        )

        call_kwargs = mock_audit_service.record.call_args
        # Accept positional or keyword argument conventions
        passed_entry = (
            call_kwargs.kwargs.get("entry")
            or call_kwargs.args[0]
        )
        assert passed_entry.actor_user_id == clinician.user_id

    def test_audit_entry_contains_patient_id(
        self, break_glass_service, clinician, emergent_patient,
        mock_patient_repository, mock_audit_service
    ):
        """The audit record must capture the target patient's identifier."""
        mock_patient_repository.find_by_id.return_value = emergent_patient

        break_glass_service.invoke(
            actor=clinician,
            patient_id=emergent_patient.patient_id,
            reason=VALID_REASON,
        )

        call_kwargs = mock_audit_service.record.call_args
        passed_entry = (
            call_kwargs.kwargs.get("entry")
            or call_kwargs.args[0]
        )
        assert passed_entry.patient_id == emergent_patient.patient_id

    def test_audit_entry_contains_reason(
        self, break_glass_service, clinician, emergent_patient,
        mock_patient_repository, mock_audit_service
    ):
        """The audit record must persist the clinician-supplied reason."""
        mock_patient_repository.find_by_id.return_value = emergent_patient

        break_glass_service.invoke(
            actor=clinician,
            patient_id=emergent_patient.patient_id,
            reason=VALID_REASON,
        )

        call_kwargs = mock_audit_service.record.call_args
        passed_entry = (
            call_kwargs.kwargs.get("entry")
            or call_kwargs.args[0]
        )
        assert passed_entry.reason == VALID_REASON

    def test_audit_entry_access_level_is_break_glass(
        self, break_glass_service, clinician, emergent_patient,
        mock_patient_repository, mock_audit_service
    ):
        """The audit record must be tagged with BREAK_GLASS access level."""
        mock_patient_repository.find_by_id.return_value = emergent_patient

        break_glass_service.invoke(
            actor=clinician,
            patient_id=emergent_patient.patient_id,
            reason=VALID_REASON,
        )

        call_kwargs = mock_audit_service.record.call_args
        passed_entry = (
            call_kwargs.kwargs.get("entry")
            or call_kwargs.args[0]
        )
        assert passed_entry.access_level == AccessLevel.BREAK_GLASS

    def test_audit_entry_has_a_timestamp(
        self, break_glass_service, clinician, emergent_patient,
        mock_patient_repository, mock_audit_service
    ):
        """The audit record must have a non-None timestamp."""
        mock_patient_repository.find_by_id.return_value = emergent_patient

        break_glass_service.invoke(
            actor=clinician,
            patient_id=emergent_patient.patient_id,
            reason=VALID_REASON,
        )

        call_kwargs = mock_audit_service.record.call_args
        passed_entry = (
            call_kwargs.kwargs.get("entry")
            or call_kwargs.args[0]
        )
        assert passed_entry.timestamp is not None

    def test_audit_entry_timestamp_is_recent(
        self, break_glass_service, clinician, emergent_patient,
        mock_patient_repository, mock_audit_service
    ):
        """The audit timestamp should be within a few seconds of wall-clock time."""
        mock_patient_repository.find_by_id.return_value = emergent_patient
        before = datetime.utcnow()

        # Allow the service to set its own timestamp
        mock_audit_service.record.side_effect = lambda entry: AuditEntry(
            entry_id="audit-ts-test",
            event_type="BREAK_GLASS_ACCESS",
            actor_user_id=entry.actor_user_id,
            patient_id=entry.patient_id,
            timestamp=datetime.utcnow(),
            access_level=entry.access_level,
            reason=entry.reason,
        )

        break_glass_service.invoke(
            actor=clinician,
            patient_id=emergent_patient.patient_id,
            reason=VALID_REASON,
        )

        after = datetime.utcnow()
        call_kwargs = mock_audit_service.record.call_args
        passed_entry = (
            call_kwargs.kwargs.get("entry")
            or call_kwargs.args[0]
        )
        assert before <= passed_entry.timestamp <= after

    def test_audit_entry_id_is_returned_in_result(
        self, break_glass_service, clinician, emergent_patient,
        mock_patient_repository, mock_audit_service
    ):
        """The result object must expose the audit entry ID for traceability."""
        mock_patient_repository.find_by_id.return_value = emergent_patient
        mock_audit_service.record.return_value = AuditEntry(
            entry_id="audit-xyz",
            event_type="BREAK_GLASS_ACCESS",
            actor_user_id=clinician.user_id,
            patient_id=emergent_patient.patient_id,
            timestamp=datetime.utcnow(),
            access_level=AccessLevel.BREAK_GLASS,
            reason=VALID_REASON,
        )

        result = break_glass_service.invoke(
            actor=clinician,
            patient_id=emergent_patient.patient_id,
            reason=VALID_REASON,
        )

        assert result.audit_entry_id == "audit-xyz"

    def test_audit_records_event_type_correctly(
        self, break_glass_service, clinician, emergent_patient,
        mock_patient_repository, mock_audit_service
    ):
        """The audit entry event_type must be the canonical BREAK_GLASS_ACCESS string."""
        mock_patient_repository.find_by_id.return_value = emergent_patient

        break_glass_service.invoke(
            actor=clinician,
            patient_id=emergent_patient.patient_id,
            reason=VALID_REASON,
        )

        call_kwargs = mock_audit_service.record.call_args
        passed_entry = (
            call_kwargs.kwargs.get("entry")
            or call_kwargs.args[0]
        )
        assert passed_entry.event_type == "BREAK_GLASS_ACCESS"

    def test_audit_is_not_called_when_access_is_denied(
        self, break_glass_service, non_clinician_user, emergent_patient,
        mock_patient_repository, mock_audit_service
    ):
        """Denied (unauthorized) invocations must NOT create a successful audit entry."""
        mock_patient_repository.find_by_id.return_value = emergent_patient

        with pytest.raises(UnauthorizedBreakGlassError):
            break_glass_service.invoke(
                actor=non_clinician_user,
                patient_id=emergent_patient.patient_id,
                reason=VALID_REASON,
            )

        mock_audit_service.record.assert_not_called()

    def test_failed_audit_write_rolls_back_access(
        self, break_glass_service, clinician, emergent_patient,
        mock_patient_repository, mock_audit_service
    ):
        """If the audit service fails, access must be denied (audit-first guarantee)."""
        mock_patient_repository.find_by_id.return_value = emergent_patient
        mock_audit_service.record.side_effect = AuditServiceError("DB unreachable")

        with pytest.raises(AuditServiceError):
            break_glass_service.invoke(
                actor=clinician,
                patient_id=emergent_patient.patient_id,
                reason=VALID_REASON,
            )

    def test_multiple_invocations_each_create_separate_audit_entries(
        self, break_glass_service, clinician, emergent_patient,
        mock_patient_repository, mock_audit_service, mock_review_service
    ):
        """Each break-glass event must produce an independent audit trail entry."""
        mock_patient_repository.find_by_id.return_value = emergent_patient
        mock_audit_service.record.side_effect = [
            AuditEntry(
                entry_id=f"audit-{i}",
                event_type="BREAK_GLASS_ACCESS",
                actor_user_id=clinician.user_id,
                patient_id=emergent_patient.patient_id,
                timestamp=datetime.utcnow(),
                access_level=AccessLevel.BREAK_GLASS,
                reason=VALID_REASON,
            )
            for i in range(3)
        ]
        mock_review_service.create_review.side_effect = [
            PostEventReview(
                review_id=f"review-{i}",
                audit_entry_id=f"audit-{i}",
                clinician_id=clinician.user_id,
                patient_id=emergent_patient.patient_id,
                created_at=datetime.utcnow(),
                status=ReviewStatus.PENDING,
                due_date=datetime.utcnow() + timedelta(hours=24),
            )
            for i in range(3)
        ]

        for _ in range(3):
            break_glass_service.invoke(
                actor=clinician,
                patient_id=emergent_patient.patient_id,
                reason=VALID_REASON,
            )

        assert mock_audit_service.record.call_count == 3


# ===========================================================================
# 3. POST-EVENT REVIEW – break-glass use triggers a review
# ===========================================================================

class TestPostEventReviewTrigger:
    """Tests that every audited break-glass event triggers a post-event review."""

    def test_post_event_review_is_created_on_invocation(
        self, break_glass_service, clinician, emergent_patient,
        mock_patient_repository, mock_review_service
    ):
        """A post-event review must be created for every successful invocation."""
        mock_patient_repository.find_by_id.return_value = emergent_patient

        break_glass_service.invoke(
            actor=clinician,
            patient_id=emergent_patient.patient_id,
            reason=VALID_REASON,
        )

        mock_review_service.create_review.assert_called_once()

    def test_review_is_linked_to_audit_entry(
        self, break_glass_service, clinician, emergent_patient,
        mock_patient_repository, mock_audit_service, mock_review_service
    ):
        """The post-event review must reference the audit entry created in the same event."""
        mock_patient_repository.find_by_id.return_value = emergent_patient
        audit_id = "audit-linked-001"
        mock_audit_service.record.return_value = AuditEntry(
            entry_id=audit_id,
            event_type="BREAK_GLASS_ACCESS",
            actor_user_id=clinician.user_id,
            patient_id=emergent_patient.patient_id,
            timestamp=datetime.utcnow(),
            access_level=AccessLevel.BREAK_GLASS,
            reason=VALID_REASON,
        )

        break_glass_service.invoke(
            actor=clinician,
            patient_id=emergent_patient.patient_id,
            reason=VALID_REASON,
        )

        call_kwargs = mock_review_service.create_review.call_args
        review_request = (
            call_kwargs.kwargs.get("review")
            or call_kwargs.args[0]
        )
        assert review_request.audit_entry_id == audit_id

    def test_review_is_linked_to_clinician(
        self, break_glass_service, clinician, emergent_patient,
        mock_patient_repository, mock_review_service
    ):
        """The review must be attributed to the invoking clinician."""
        mock_patient_repository.find_by_id.return_value = emergent_patient

        break_glass_service.invoke(
            actor=clinician,
            patient_id=emergent_patient.patient_id,
            reason=VALID_REASON,
        )

        call_kwargs = mock_review_service.create_review.call_args
        review_request = (
            call_kwargs.kwargs.get("review")
            or call_kwargs.args[0]
        )
        assert review_request.clinician_id == clinician.user_id

    def test_review_is_linked_to_patient(
        self, break_glass_service, clinician, emergent_patient,
        mock_patient_repository, mock_review_service
    ):
        """The review must reference the target patient."""
        mock_patient_repository.find_by_id.return_value = emergent_patient

        break_glass_service.invoke(
            actor=clinician,
            patient_id=emergent_patient.patient_id,
            reason=VALID_REASON,
        )

        call_kwargs = mock_review_service.create_review.call_args
        review_request = (
            call_kwargs.kwargs.get("review")
            or call_kwargs.args[0]
        )
        assert review_request.patient_id == emergent_patient.patient_id

    def test_review_initial_status_is_pending(
        self, break_glass_service, clinician, emergent_patient,
        mock_patient_repository, mock_review_service
    ):
        """Newly created reviews must have PENDING status."""
        mock_patient_repository.find_by_id.return_value = emergent_patient

        break_glass_service.invoke(
            actor=clinician,
            patient_id=emergent_patient.patient_id,
            reason=VALID_REASON,
        )

        call_kwargs = mock_review_service.create_review.call_args
        review_request = (
            call_kwargs.kwargs.get("review")
            or call_kwargs.args[0]
        )
        assert review_request.status == ReviewStatus.PENDING

    def test_review_has_a_due_date(
        self, break_glass_service, clinician, emergent_patient,
        mock_patient_repository, mock_review_service
    ):
        """Each review must carry a due date to enforce timely completion."""
        mock_patient_repository.find_by_id.return_value = emergent_patient

        break_glass_service.invoke(
            actor=clinician,
            patient_id=emergent_patient.patient_id,
            reason=VALID_REASON,
        )

        call_kwargs = mock_review_service.create_review.call_args
        review_request = (
            call_kwargs.kwargs.get("review")
            or call_kwargs.args[0]
        )
        assert review_request.due_date is not None

    def test_review_due_date_is_after_creation(
        self, break_glass_service, clinician, emergent_patient,
        mock_patient_repository, mock_review_service
    ):
        """The review due date must be strictly in the future relative to creation."""
        mock_patient_repository.find_by_id.return_value = emergent_patient

        break_glass_service.invoke(
            actor=clinician,
            patient_id=emergent_patient.patient_id,
            reason=VALID_REASON,
        )

        call_kwargs = mock_review_service.create_review.call_args
        review_request = (
            call_kwargs.kwargs.get("review")
            or call_kwargs.args[0]
        )
        assert review_request.due_date > review_request.created_at

    def test_review_id_is_returned_in_result(
        self, break_glass_service, clinician, emergent_patient,
        mock_patient_repository, mock_review_service
    ):
        """The result object must expose the review ID for downstream use."""
        mock_patient_repository.find_by_id.return_value = emergent_patient
        mock_review_service.create_review.return_value = PostEventReview(
            review_id="review-abc",
            audit_entry_id="audit-001",
            clinician_id=clinician.user_id,
            patient_id=emergent_patient.patient_id,
            created_at=datetime.utcnow(),
            status=ReviewStatus.PENDING,
            due_date=datetime.utcnow() + timedelta(hours=24),
        )

        result = break_glass_service.invoke(
            actor=clinician,
            patient_id=emergent_patient.patient_id,
            reason=VALID_REASON,
        )

        assert result.review_id == "review-abc"

    def test_review_not_created_when_access_is_denied(
        self, break_glass_service, non_clinician_user, emergent_patient,
        mock_patient_repository, mock_review_service
    ):
        """A review must NOT be created if the access attempt was denied."""
        mock_patient_repository.find_by_id.return_value = emergent_patient

        with pytest.raises(UnauthorizedBreakGlassError):
            break_glass_service.invoke(
                actor=non_clinician_user,
                patient_id=emergent_patient.patient_id,
                reason=VALID_REASON,
            )

        mock_review_service.create_review.assert_not_called()

    def test_review_not_created_when_audit_fails(
        self, break_glass_service, clinician, emergent_patient,
        mock_patient_repository, mock_audit_service, mock_review_service
    ):
        """If the audit write fails, no review should be created (atomicity)."""
        mock_patient_repository.find_by_id.return_value = emergent_patient
        mock_audit_service.record.side_effect = AuditServiceError("DB unreachable")

        with pytest.raises(AuditServiceError):
            break_glass_service.invoke(
                actor=clinician,
                patient_id=emergent_patient.patient_id,
                reason=VALID_REASON,
            )

        mock_review_service.create_review.assert_not_called()

    def test_failed_review_creation_raises_error(
        self, break_glass_service, clinician, emergent_patient,
        mock_patient_repository, mock_review_service
    ):
        """A failure in review creation must surface as a ReviewServiceError."""
        mock_patient_repository.find_by_id.return_value = emergent_patient
        mock_review_service.create_review.side_effect = ReviewServiceError(
            "Review service unavailable"
        )

        with pytest

Requirement: A clinician shall invoke break-glass access for an emergent patient;
break-glass use shall be audited and trigger a post-event review.

Test Strategy:
- Unit tests for break-glass invocation logic

- Post-event review trigger verification

- Edge cases and error handling
"""

    ADMIN = "admin"
    AUDITOR = "auditor"
    PATIENT = "patient"

    BREAK_GLASS = "break_glass"

    PENDING = "pending"
    IN_PROGRESS = "in_progress"
    COMPLETED = "completed"
    ESCALATED = "escalated"

    name: str

Requirement: A clinician shall invoke break-glass access for an emergent patient;
break-glass use shall be audited and trigger a post-event review.

Test Strategy:
- Unit tests for break-glass invocation logic
- Audit logging verification
- Post-event review trigger verification

import pytest
import uuid
from datetime import datetime, timedelta
from unittest.mock import MagicMock, patch, call, ANY
from dataclasses import dataclass, field
from typing import Optional
from enum import Enum


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Domain models (stand-ins for the real application models)
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

class UserRole(Enum):
    CLINICIAN = "clinician"
    ADMIN = "admin"
    AUDITOR = "auditor"
    PATIENT = "patient"


class AccessLevel(Enum):
    NORMAL = "normal"
    BREAK_GLASS = "break_glass"


class ReviewStatus(Enum):
    PENDING = "pending"
    IN_PROGRESS = "in_progress"
    COMPLETED = "completed"
    ESCALATED = "escalated"


@dataclass
class User:
    user_id: str
    name: str
    role: UserRole
    license_number: Optional[str] = None
    department: Optional[str] = None


@dataclass
class Patient:
    patient_id: str
    name: str
    is_emergent: bool = False


@dataclass
class AuditEntry:
    entry_id: str
    event_type: str
    actor_user_id: str
    patient_id: str
    timestamp: datetime
    access_level: AccessLevel
    reason: str
    metadata: dict = field(default_factory=dict)

    audit_entry_id: str

    created_at: datetime
    status: ReviewStatus
    due_date: datetime
    assigned_reviewer_id: Optional[str] = None
    resolution_notes: Optional[str] = None


@dataclass
class BreakGlassAccessResult:
    success: bool
    access_token: Optional[str]
    audit_entry_id: Optional[str]
    review_id: Optional[str]
    error_message: Optional[str] = None


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Exceptions
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

class UnauthorizedBreakGlassError(Exception):
    """Raised when a non-clinician attempts break-glass access."""


class PatientNotFoundError(Exception):
    """Raised when the target patient does not exist."""


class MissingReasonError(Exception):
    """Raised when no reason is supplied for break-glass access."""


class AuditServiceError(Exception):
    """Raised when the audit service fails to record an entry."""


class ReviewServiceError(Exception):
    """Raised when the review service fails to create a review."""

        patient_id="patient-001",
